Dynamic Fixation Plate Hip System

ARMAR · Anatomical Plates

Orthopedic trauma products designed for fractures, bone tumors, and deformities, boasting high fatigue strength, proper fixation, and minimal soft tissue damage.

MaterialTiCP (Titanium)

Materials

TiCP (Titanium), TAN (Titanium Alloy)

Ø 2.4mm Cortex Screw T8, Self Tapping

Material: TAN

Primary Material

TiCP (Titanium)

CDSCO Validated Data
Frequently Asked Questions

The Dynamic Fixation Plate Hip System delivers advanced trauma care through innovative sliding compression technology for optimal fracture healing. This titanium alloy locking plate system provides anatomically contoured fixation with dynamic compression capabilities, ensuring superior load distribution across hip fractures. Designed for complex trauma cases, the system offers reliable internal fixation while promoting natural bone healing processes. Ideal for hospitals treating femoral neck fractures and intertrochanteric hip injuries with enhanced patient outcomes.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Dynamic Fixation Plate Hip System, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Dynamic Fixation Plate Hip System is constructed using TiCP (Titanium), ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
